title: hieracium lycopifolium subsp. bifrons
intro: Hieracium lycopifolium subsp. bifrons, also known as the yellow hawkweed or false hawkweed, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae) and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Hieracium lycopifolium subsp. bifrons include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy in folk medicine. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried extract, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
